summary: Urgency Classification Feature Testing - Iteration 280. All features verified: (1) Pipeline page loads after login, (2) Hero card renders with school name, signals, CTA, (3) Section header 'Needs attention now' shows total count + urgency breakdown tags (2 Overdue), (4) Card badges show canonical urgency class: OVERDUE (red) for overdue programs, ATTENTION NEEDED for non-overdue attention items, ON TRACK for watch items, (5) API /api/athlete/programs returns urgency_class field for each program, (6) urgency_class values are correct (overdue for past-due, on_track for active), (7) Cards clickable and navigate to school detail, (8) Priority/Pipeline toggle works, (9) On track section renders correctly with ON TRACK badges, (10) Mobile viewport: section headers with urgency tags render properly.
critical_code_review_comments: stage_engine.py: compute_urgency_class() (lines 224-257) - canonical function returns overdue|due_today|stalled|on_track|none based on next_action_due and days_since_activity - VERIFIED
athlete_dashboard.py: list_programs() (line 525) - adds urgency_class to each program using compute_urgency_class() - VERIFIED
connected.py: summary (lines 128-143) - includes overdue, due_today, stalled, needs_attention counts using urgency_class - VERIFIED
PriorityBoard.js: urgencyMap lookup (lines 239-244) - builds map from programs prop, applies to cards - VERIFIED
PriorityBoard.js: section header urgency tags (lines 307-325) - shows '2 Overdue', '1 Due today' etc in red/amber - VERIFIED
PriorityBoard.js: card badges (lines 138-151) - reads urgency_class to show OVERDUE/DUE TODAY/STALLED/ATTENTION NEEDED/ON TRACK - VERIFIED

success_rate.backend: 100% - 7/7 tests passed (1 skipped - requires director token)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Urgency classification feature complete. Key changes: (1) stage_engine.py has compute_urgency_class() that returns overdue|due_today|stalled|on_track|none, (2) Both list_programs() and connected.py summary use this canonical function, (3) PriorityBoard.js shows urgency breakdown tags in section headers (e.g., '2 Overdue' in red), (4) Card badges show urgency_class values (OVERDUE in red, ATTENTION NEEDED, ON TRACK). API returns urgency_class for each program. Mobile viewport works correctly.

pipeline_page_loads.details: Pipeline page loads after login, shows recruiting-board

hero_card_renders.details: Hero card shows UCLA with TOP PRIORITY badge, school name, 3 signals (Overdue follow-up needs action, Coach responded, Momentum is building), CTA 'Follow up now'

section_header_urgency_breakdown.details: Section header 'Needs attention now' shows count '3' and urgency tag '2 Overdue' in red

card_badges_urgency_class.details: Card badges show OVERDUE (red) for Emory/Florida, ATTENTION NEEDED for Stanford, ON TRACK for Creighton

api_urgency_class_field.details: GET /api/athlete/programs returns urgency_class for each program (overdue, on_track, etc.)

urgency_class_values_correct.details: overdue programs have past due dates, on_track programs have future/no due dates

cards_clickable_navigate.details: Clicking card navigates to /pipeline/{program_id} school detail page

priority_pipeline_toggle.details: Priority/Pipeline toggle switches between views correctly

on_track_section.details: On track section renders with ON TRACK badges for watch items

mobile_viewport.details: Mobile viewport (390x844) renders section headers with urgency tags correctly
